hero.title: World Multi-Category Pizza Trophy
hero.subtitle: The international championship dedicated to professional pizza chefs: skills, creativity and excellence.

intro.title: A Unique Global Event
intro.text: The World Pizza Trophy brings together the best professional pizza chefs from around the world to compete across multiple official categories under an international expert jury.

items.title: International recognition
items.text: Gain visibility from media, sponsors, schools and professional networks.

items.title: Official titles
items.text: Multiple trophies rewarding cooking mastery, creativity, presentation and innovation.

items.title: Professional networking
items.text: Meet world-class chefs, product brands, suppliers and industry leaders.

cta.title: Ready to take on the challenge?
cta.subtitle: Register now and secure your demonstration slot.

meta.title: World Multi-Category Pizza Trophy
meta.description: The international championship dedicated to professional pizza chefs: skills, creativity and excellence.
meta.keywords: pizza, trophy, competition, pizzaiolo, professional, international, multi-category, creativity, excellence

rules.title: Rules & Categories
rules.subtitle: Discover the 12 official categories of the World Pizza Trophy.

categories.name: Neapolitan
categories.description: The art of Vera Pizza Napoletana.

categories.name: Pizza Dué
categories.description: Special technical category - Chef Ziolo Trophy.

generalRules.title: General Rules
generalRules.organization: The World Pizza Trophy is organized by the France Pizza Chefs Team Association.
generalRules.ageRequirement: The Trophy is open to all pizza chefs aged 16 and over.
generalRules.uniformRequirement: Competitors must wear the t-shirt and cap provided by the organization.
generalRules.jewelryBan: For hygiene reasons, it is forbidden to wear jewelry, bracelets, rings or watches.
generalRules.ownProducts: Each participant must use their own products to prepare their own pizza.
generalRules.preparationRoom: A room will be set up for preparations, mixing and storing dough. Only induction plates are authorized for preparations (no gas).

penalties.title: Penalties
penalties.timeExceeded: The authorized time for each category is specified at registration.

serving.title: Jury Presentation
serving.description: The pizza must be served directly to the jury by the competitors.
serving.beverage: It is possible to serve the pizza with an accompanying beverage but it is strictly forbidden to provide utensils, plates, cutlery.
serving.jury: The table jury will consist of qualified judges. Each will give a score between 1 and 100 for taste and cooking respectively.

generalRules.cancellation: In case of non-participation, registration fees will only be refunded if the organization is notified at least 15 days before the event begins.
generalRules.rights: The Organization exclusively reserves the rights of publicity and image concerning the participants of each category of the competition and the unlimited use of photographic, video or other material, without charge or obligation for the participants themselves.

classique.name: Classic Pizza
classique.description: Classic pizza represents the excellence of pizza tradition.

calzone.name: Calzone
calzone.description: Mastery of folding and baking this Italian specialty.

napolitaine.name: Neapolitan
napolitaine.description: The art of authentic Vera Pizza Napoletana.
rules: Flour, water, yeast, salt only for dough

dessert.name: Dessert Pizza
dessert.description: Sweet creativity on pizza dough, innovation and originality.

doue.name: Pizza Dué - Chef Ziolo Trophy
doue.description: Special category: chef has two induction plates.
rules: Two induction plates with pans for topping preparation

pasta.name: Pasta
pasta.description: The art of Italian pasta, gastronomic excellence.

rapidite.name: Speed
rules: Respect for hygiene rules under pressure

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Contact us for any information about the World Pizza Trophy.

hours.label: Opening Hours
hours.value:
Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Saturday: 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM

items.question: When can I register?
items.answer: Registrations are done online on our website. Registration deadlines are displayed on the home page.

items.question: What is the participation cost?
items.answer: The cost varies depending on the categories. Check the reservation page for detailed rates.

items.question: Can I participate in multiple categories?
items.answer: Yes, you can participate in multiple categories. Each category requires a separate registration.

items.question: Are there preparation fees?
items.answer: No, you use your own products. The organization only provides cooking equipment.

items.question: What is the competition duration?
items.answer: The duration varies by category and is specified during registration.
